buildCommand: npx expo export -p web && node scripts/post-build-web.js

headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://vesti-nine.vercel.app https://brapi.dev https://api.groq.com https://*.statusinvest.com.br https://query1.finance.yahoo.com https://corsproxy.io; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
